name: Silver State Opportunity Grant
summary: Nevada's state-funded need-based grant for low-income, college-ready students attending an NSHE community or state college.

award.notes: Need-based; helps cover a portion of the cost of attendance. Award amounts vary by institution and need.

deadline.notes: Apply via FAFSA and your NSHE institution's financial aid office; verify the current cycle's deadline.

other: Enroll at an eligible NSHE community college or state college
Meet enrollment / college-ready credit requirements (verify current rules)

provenance.source_name: NSHE System Administration — State Financial Aid
